name: rolemanager
author: Taako
description: A combined role management cog inspired by RoleUtils and RoleTools, with self roles, policy rules, reaction roles, button roles, select-menu roles, autoroles, sticky roles, temporary roles, bulk role operations, migration helpers, and Red-Web-Dashboard support.
install_msg: rolemanager loaded. Use `[p]rolemanager` or `[p]rm` for setup commands, `[p]selfrole <role>` for member self roles, and `[p]rolemanager button`, `[p]rolemanager select`, or `[p]rolemanager reactrole` for role panels.
short: Complete role management with self roles, policies, reaction roles, buttons, selects, autoroles, sticky roles, temp roles, and bulk tools.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild role configuration, role-policy settings, role costs, button/select/reaction-role component settings, message IDs, channel IDs, role IDs, emoji keys, temporary-role expiry timestamps, and Discord user IDs for sticky and temporary role assignment. It does not store message content except optional component panel text sent directly to Discord.
